badge: Black Dog Works • Custom 3D Printed Parts

hero.headline: Broken plastic part? We'll recreate it.
hero.subtext: Send a photo of the broken part, explain what it needs to do, and we'll let you know if it can be redesigned and 3D printed.

projects.label: Recent Projects
projects.heading: Real-world parts and prototypes
projects.subtext: A few examples of the kinds of parts Black Dog Works can help recreate, adapt, or prototype.

items.title: Dishwasher rack clip
items.description: Small replacement clip recreated from a broken original.

items.title: Car interior bracket
items.description: Custom plastic bracket for a missing interior piece.

items.title: Prototype enclosure
items.description: Simple enclosure for testing a small electronics project.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.heading: Send a photo
steps.text: Upload clear photos of the broken part, the item it belongs to, and any rough measurements.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.heading: Get a quote
steps.text: We review the part and send you a quote based on complexity, design time, and print requirements.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.heading: Approve and print
steps.text: Once approved, we print the part and arrange pickup, local delivery, or shipping.

cta_section.heading: Not every part can be 3D printed — but many can.
cta_section.text: We'll be honest about what is realistic. Some parts need strength, heat resistance, flexibility, or precision that may require special materials or another manufacturing method.

quote.heading: Request a quote
quote.subtext: Tell us what broke, what it connects to, and what the part needs to do. Photos are the most helpful.
quote.name: Name
quote.message_placeholder: Example: The plastic clip on my dishwasher rack broke. I still have one intact clip to copy.
quote.success: Request received — we'll be in touch soon.
quote.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
